case_title: ENRIQUE ESCOBAR VS. INTERCONTINENTAL HOTELS OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESCOBAR, ENRIQUE HEARING SET FOR OCT-14-2015 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-14-2015 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF ENRIQUE ESCOBAR'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF ESCOBAR, ENRIQUE
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESCOBAR, ENRIQUE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-18-2015 CONTINUED TO DEC-30-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 58298578)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESCOBAR, ENRIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT INTERCONTINENTAL HOTELS OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. DOES 1 THROUGH 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-18-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-08-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-26-2015

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-09-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-30-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-09-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
